Class sbktech.tools.hashjava.util.QuickSort 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----sbktech.tools.hashjava.util.QuickSort
public class QuickSort
extends Object

QuickSort()

sort(Vector, int, int)

QuickSort 
  public QuickSort()

sort 
  public static void sort(Vector v,
                          int start,
                          int end)
Parameters:
v - is a Vector of (end - start + 1) Sortable elements
start - is the first index of the entries to be sorted
end - is the last index of the entries to be sorted.
